channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ZARCOLEA] Arco Leasing Ltd Approves Appointment of New Managing Director, Chief Financial Officer, and Independent Directors
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Arco Leasing Ltd has approved the appointment of Mr. Akash Dubey as Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer, and Mrs. Jeny Gowadia and Mr. Keyur Shah as Additional Non-executive independent directors. The appointments are subject to approval of members in the general meeting. The board also confirmed that the appointees are not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any order of Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) or any other such authority.

  • Arco Leasing Ltd approves the appointment of Mr. Akash Dubey as Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer.
  • Mrs. Jeny Gowadia and Mr. Keyur Shah approved as Additional Non-executive independent directors.
  • Appointments subject to approval of members in the general meeting.
  • Appointees not debarred from holding the office of Director by SEBI or any other authority.
  • New appointments effective from the date of approval in the general meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arco Leasing Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DCMSRMIND] DCM Shriram Industries Ltd: Alok Bansidhar Shriram's Family to Acquire 7.53% Shares for Rs. 40.70 Each
item.description:
DCM Shriram Industries Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) in respect of acquisition under Regulation 10(1)(a) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations. Alok Bansidhar Shriram's family, including Karuna Shriram (Wife), Kanika Shriram (Daughter), and Rudra Shriram (Son), are proposed to acquire shares. The proposed acquisition is for a total of 7.53% of the share capital of the TC at a price of Rs. 40.70 per share. The rationale behind this proposed transfer is an inter-family gift for the consolidation of holding.

  • Alok Bansidhar Shriram's family to acquire 7.53% shares of DCM Shriram Industries Ltd.
  • The acquisition price is set at Rs. 40.70 per share.
  • The proposed acquisition is due to an inter-family gift for holding consolidation.
  • Exemption from open offer as per Regulation 10 (1)(a)(i) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • Transferor and transferee have complied with applicable disclosure requirements in Chapter V of the Takeover Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM SHRIRAM INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ZARCOLEA] Arco Leasing Ltd. Board Meeting Approves Key Appointments
item.description:
In a recent board meeting held on 09.03.2026, Arco Leasing Ltd. approved several key appointments. The board approved the appointment of Mrs. Jeny Gowadia and Mr. Keyur Shah as Additional Non-executive independent directors, subject to approval of members in the general meeting. Furthermore, the board approved the appointment of Mr. Akash Dubey as Additional Director, Managing Director, Chief Financial Officer, and as Company Secretary, subject to approval of members in the general meeting. The appointments are for a term of 5 years, with effect from the date of appointment.

  • Approval of Mrs. Jeny Gowadia's appointment as Additional Non-executive independent director
  • Approval of Mr. Keyur Shah's appointment as Additional Non-executive independent director
  • Approval of Mr. Akash Dubey's appointment as Additional Director, Managing Director, Chief Financial Officer, and Company Secretary

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arco Leasing Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUDTIND-B] Suditi Industries Allots 39 Lakh Equity Shares on 09.03.2026 Pursuant to Conversion of Warrants
item.description:
Suditi Industries Ltd. has allotted 39,00,000 equity shares on 09.03.2026 to warrant holders belonging to the promoter category. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of warrants held by them, for which they have paid the balance 75% of the issue price. The total amount paid for these shares is Rs. 8,04,37,500. The warrants were allotted on 02nd January 2026, and the warrant holders are entitled to get their warrants converted into equal number of equity shares of the company by paying the remaining 75% amount within 18 months from the date of warrants allotment. The new equity shares so allotted on the preferential allotment basis shall rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company in all respects. Consequent to allotment of the aforesaid shares, the issued and paid-up capital of the company stands increased to Rs. 47,11,62,910 divided into 4,71,16,291 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.

  • Suditi Industries allots 39,00,000 equity shares to warrant holders
  • Allotment is pursuant to conversion of warrants held by promoter category
  • Total amount paid for these shares is Rs. 8,04,37,500
  • Warrants were allotted on 02nd January 2026
  • New equity shares rank pari-passu with existing equity shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDITI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PRESTIGE] Prestige Estates Projects Ltd Issues Corporate Guarantee for Canopy Living LLP's Term Loan Facility
item.description:
Prestige Estates Projects Ltd, in compliance with the applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the SEBI Listing Regulations, has issued a corporate guarantee for Canopy Living LLP's term loan facility. The guarantee is worth up to INR 400 Crores from Aditya Birla Capital. The promoter/promoter group does not have any interest in this transaction. The guarantee is a contingent liability for the company, but at this point, there is no impact of this guarantee on the company.

  • Prestige Estates Projects Ltd issues corporate guarantee for Canopy Living LLP's term loan facility
  • The guarantee is worth up to INR 400 Crores from Aditya Birla Capital
  • The promoter/promoter group does not have any interest in this transaction
  • The guarantee is a contingent liability for the company
  • No impact of this guarantee on the company at this point

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRESTIGE ESTATES PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [DCMSIL] DCM Shriram International Ltd: Inter-Family Gift by Immediate Relatives for Consolidation of Holding
item.description:
DCM Shriram International Ltd has disclosed an acquisition under Regulation 10(1)(a) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquirer is Madhav Bansidhar Shriram, who is gifting shares to his wife Divya Shriram, son Uday Shriram, and son Rohan Shriram. The proposed date of acquisition is 13/03/2026. The acquisition is exempted from making an open offer under Reg 10 (1)(a)(i) as it is an inter-se transfer between immediate relatives. The acquisition price would not be higher by more than 25% of the price computed in point 6 or point 7 as applicable. The transferor and transferee have complied with applicable disclosure requirements in Chapter V of the Takeover Regulations, 2011.

  • DCM Shriram International Ltd discloses acquisition under Regulation 10(1)(a) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The acquirer is Madhav Bansidhar Shriram, who is gifting shares to his wife Divya Shriram, son Uday Shriram, and son Rohan Shriram
  • The proposed date of acquisition is 13/03/2026
  • The acquisition is exempted from making an open offer under Reg 10 (1)(a)(i) as it is an inter-se transfer between immediate relatives
  • The transferor and transferee have complied with applicable disclosure requirements in Chapter V of the Takeover Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram International Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ENERGYINF] CRISIL Reaffirms 'AAA/Stable' Rating to Energy Infrastructure Trust
item.description:
Energy Infrastructure Trust has received a reaffirmation of its 'AAA/Stable' rating from CRISIL Ratings Limited. This highest degree of safety rating indicates a low credit risk for debt obligations to the trust. CRISIL continuously monitors and reviews ratings, and the rating is also available on the trust's website.

  • CRISIL has reaffirmed its 'AAA/Stable' rating for Energy Infrastructure Trust
  • This rating indicates the highest degree of safety and lowest credit risk for debt obligations
  • CRISIL continuously monitors and reviews ratings
  • The rating is available on the Energy Infrastructure Trust's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Energy Infrastructure Trust | Category: Rating

item.title: [MINDSPACE] Mindspace Business Parks REIT Fulfills Payment Obligations of INR 560 Crores Commercial Paper
item.description:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT has informed the Exchange about fulfilling its payment obligations in respect of redemption of Commercial Paper of INR 560,00,00,000 (Rupees five hundred and sixty crores) on March 09, 2026. The Commercial Papers were issued by Mindspace REIT on Private Placement basis of face value of INR 5,00,000 each at a discounted value of INR 4,83,014.50 each. No dues are outstanding on maturity date.

  • Mindspace Business Parks REIT has fulfilled its payment obligations in respect of redemption of Commercial Paper of INR 560 crores.
  • The Commercial Papers were issued by Mindspace REIT on Private Placement basis of face value of INR 5,00,000 each at a discounted value of INR 4,83,014.50 each.
  • No dues are outstanding on maturity date.
  • Mindspace REIT has requested to take the above information on record and delist the scrip code ‘730079’.
  • The redemption was carried out by the Manager to Mindspace Business Parks REIT, K Raheja Corp Investment Managers Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mindspace Business Parks REIT | Category: Investment

item.title: [HIGHSTREE] Tusaldah Ltd Appoints Experienced Chartered Accountant Vipin Chaturvedi as Chief Financial Officer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tusaldah Ltd has appointed Mr. Vipin Chaturvedi as the Chief Financial Officer (Key Managerial Personnel) of the company, effective from 9th March 2026. Mr. Chaturvedi is a seasoned Chartered Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the real estate and chemical manufacturing industries. He has a strong background in financial strategy, operational excellence, RERA compliance, and legal documentation. He has also contributed to Pre-IPO readiness, working capital optimization, and statutory compliance in Group CFO-level roles. Mr. Chaturvedi is skilled in corporate restructuring, income tax assessments, and is proficient in Tally ERP and MS Office.

  • Tusaldah Ltd appoints Vipin Chaturvedi as Chief Financial Officer
  • Mr. Chaturvedi has over 30 years of experience in real estate and chemical manufacturing industries
  • He has a strong background in financial strategy and operational excellence
  • Experienced in RERA compliance, legal documentation, and corporate restructuring
  • Proficient in Tally ERP and MS Office

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIGH STREET FILATEX LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AZTEC] Aztec Fluids' Subsidiary, Jet Inks Private Limited, Exits NPA Category
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aztec Fluids & Machinery Ltd. has announced that its subsidiary, Jet Inks Private Limited, has moved out of the Non Performing Assets (NPA) category. The account was previously tagged under the 'NPA Category' due to non-renewal of personal guarantee by the erstwhile promoters, leading to non-renewal of banking limits beyond the prescribed period. However, this was not due to any payment defaults by Aztec Fluids or Jet Inks. The account has been regularised as of 9th March, 2026, as per the email received from ICICI Bank.

  • Aztec Fluids' subsidiary, Jet Inks Private Limited, exits NPA category
  • Non-renewal of personal guarantee by erstwhile promoters led to NPA tagging
  • No payment defaults by Aztec Fluids or Jet Inks
  • Account regularised as of 9th March, 2026
  • Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and RBI prudential norms apply

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aztec Fluids & Machinery Ltd | Category: Monthly Update
